prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily log returns for LOW over the past 1 year(s) were analyzed to estimate the daily drift (-0.000141) and daily volatility (0.015243). The point estimate represents the median of the projected log-normal price distribution after 20 trading days. The confidence intervals are derived from the percentiles of this log-normal distribution, reflecting the inherent uncertainty and potential price fluctuations based on historical volatility and drift.
